name: zsnoop-mcp
description: ZFS snapshot exploration and recovery over SSH through the zsnoop-mcp server.

zsnoop_config.title: Zsnoop Config
zsnoop_config.description: Optional path to hosts.toml. If unset, zsnoop-mcp uses $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/zsnoop-mcp/hosts.toml or ~/.config/zsnoop-mcp/hosts.toml.

zsnoop_log_level.title: Zsnoop Log Level
zsnoop_log_level.description: Optional zsnoop-mcp stderr log level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.
